name: Ginger Snap
title: Ginger Snap Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Ginger Snap Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A festive highball that swaps vodka for BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale.
marketing_description: We’ve given the mule a festive, Caribbean twist by swapping clear vodka for BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum. Perfect for any holiday soireé.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Ginger Snap 44 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold Rum 89 ml Ginger Ale ... Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Gold rum and ginger ale. Mix gently. Garnish with a lime wheel.
